font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; line-height: 1.05; margin: 0px; color: rgb(31, 30, 28);
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 400; font-style: italic; letter-spacing: -0.015em; line-height: 1.3; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); margin: 0px 0px 28px;

children.text: a music artist space in a former print shop — 150 cap, one beautiful PA, and a deep love for the loud end of the spectrum.
we are a worker-run collective. we split door evenly. we do not book shows that conflict with our safer-space policy, and we do not tolerate bullshit at ours.

attributes.style: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: rgb(142, 136, 126); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 18px;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 44px; font-weight: 500; font-style: italic; color: rgb(200, 39, 13); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: -0.015em;

children.text: we exist to book weird shows and pay the people who play them. 100% of door to artists for all local shows under 100 cap.

attributes.style: font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 44px; font-weight: 500; font-style: italic; color: rgb(200, 39, 13); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: -0.015em;

children.text: no racism, no transphobia, no bullshit. we enforce it. we mean it. the room has to be safe before it can be anything else.

attributes.style: font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 44px; font-weight: 500; font-style: italic; color: rgb(200, 39, 13); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(31, 30, 28); margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: -0.015em;

children.text: the PA is tuned for real volume. we honor ear protection (free at the door) and we start on time. respect the room, respect each other.

children.text: we share a block with an auto body. buzzer on the right. steel door painted red.
